name: Holo Control
summary: A single-pane command center: a birds-eye view of every external connection as a governable graph edge, with live signal-over-noise monitoring and one-click power to throttle, restrict, pause or cut any of it.

description.p: You cannot operate what you cannot see, and you should not trust what you cannot cut.

Holo Control models the whole system as a graph: this OS at the center, every external interaction an edge you can watch and govern. It consumes Holo Telemetry (ADR-0073) and stays calm by default a signal-processing core learns each edge's noise floor and surfaces only what crosses it, so you see signal and the noise recedes.

ul: A birds-eye graph of every connected app, agent, resource, person and wallet
Live ingress/egress, ranked by salience, with the honest split (re-derivable vs host-attested)
One-click throttle · restrict · pause · cut on any edge conscience-gated and sealed to a verifiable receipt
Local-first: it observes; nothing leaves the device, and a cut is real where this pane owns the channel

releases.description: The telemetry monitoring & control command center: a birds-eye edge graph over the live telemetry plane, a robust signal-over-noise DSP core (noise floor, salience, hysteresis, matched filter, aggregate SNR), four lenses (apps & agents, ingress/egress, social, wallet), an edge inspector, and a conscience-gated, receipt-sealed control plane (throttle/restrict/pause/cut). Honest where a feed is unwired no fabricated flows, balances or presence.
